name: Sculptural Accent Chair Velvet Tan - Threshold™: Wooden Frame, Round Padded Back, Open-Base Design
description:
Enhance the aesthetic appeal of your living space with this Sculptural Accent Chair from Threshold™. Supported on a wooden frame, this accent chair features a rectangular padded seat, a round padded back and padded armrests for comfortable sitting. Featuring dark tan-hued upholstery, it features an open-base design with sculptural accents at the sides for a touch of style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
